descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos defeat Richmond Sockeyes 5-3 in overtime in opening game of Centennial Cup Western Canada final.
descriptionLong: The Humboldt Broncos scored twice in overtime to defeat the Richmond Sockeyes 5-3 Monday night in the first game of the best-of-seven Centennial Cup Western Canada junior hockey final. Curtis Chamberlain scored three goals for Humboldt, including the overtime winner. The Sockeyes scored through Bryon Moller, Matt Hervey, and Jason Phillips, leading 2-1 after two periods before the teams tied 3-3 in regulation.
